messages.content: okay so I'm trying to figure out costumes for this Halloween party next weekend and I'm completely blanking... like everyone in my weekly game night group is going and I don't want to show up looking like I put zero effort in

Halloween costume stress is real! What kind of vibe is the party going for - more creative/funny or classic spooky? And do you want something you can put together easily or are you up for a DIY project?

honestly probably something easy because between thesis stuff and... well everything else I'm kind of stretched thin. my roommate Jess keeps telling me I need to get out more (she's in law school so she gets the whole academic stress thing) but then when I do make plans I stress about the time I'm not working

That's such a classic grad school catch-22. It sounds like Jess has good perspective on balancing things. For easy costumes - what about something you could pull from clothes you already have? Like a 'generic college student' or 'overworked grad student' could be pretty meta and funny.

haha okay that's actually not terrible... though honestly I've been trying to do more social stuff lately. like I started dating this person Alex who I met at the climbing gym and they're way better at the whole work-life balance thing than I am. makes me realize how much I've been in my own head about everything

That's awesome that you're dating someone who models good balance! Climbers tend to be pretty grounded people. It's funny how being around someone with different habits can make you more aware of your own patterns. Are they going to the Halloween party too?

yeah they might come! which is another reason I don't want to look completely ridiculous... but also like, our grad school friends are pretty chill. we do game night every week and nobody really cares about appearances that much. I think I'm overthinking this costume thing the same way I overthink everything else lately

It sounds like you have a really solid friend group if you're doing weekly game nights - that's actually pretty impressive consistency for grad students! And you're probably right that you're overthinking it. What games do you all usually play?

oh we rotate between like Catan, Wingspan, sometimes Codenames... actually that reminds me I should probably check if anyone wants to do a group costume theme. might be easier than trying to come up with something solo. plus then if I look ridiculous at least we all look ridiculous together

Group costumes are such a great idea! Way less pressure on any individual person and usually more fun. Board game characters could actually work really well - like everyone picks a different game piece or something. Sounds like you've got this figured out!

summary: Kai discusses Halloween party costume planning with grad school friends, mentioning their weekly game night group, roommate Jess's advice about work-life balance, and their new relationship with Alex from the climbing gym. The conversation drifts from costume stress to social dynamics and overthinking patterns.
